legend.automated: Verified in the authoring DOM by an it() block.
legend.deferred: Documented as it.skip() — requires Preview/Reader, submit-lock, persistence, network, responsive/visual, or accessibility flows.

mappings.reason: Mark word incorrect via arrow → red marking (live selection popup, Preview/Reader)
Reverse arrow undoes incorrect marking/highlight (Preview/Reader undo flow)
Highlighter non-editable after submission/completion (submit lock — Reader)
Change answer in Reader after attempt if allowed (Reader flow)
Attempts persist after close/reopen across browsers/devices (persistence/compat)
Excessively long text error/restriction (no maxlength in source — runtime/Preview)
Cannot edit after submission/completion (submit lock — Reader)
No UI break after rapid add/remove/edit/highlight/undo/redo (runtime stress)
Highlight states do not persist after restart with new student (Reader restart)
Network failure during submit/update → graceful error (Reader network)
Success pop-up 'component has been copied successfully' after copy (lifecycle)
Pop-up appears each time on multiple copy actions (lifecycle)
Copy pop-up does NOT appear for other buttons (negative lifecycle)
Copy control hidden/disabled when no component present (lifecycle)
